notes: Stage 3 directed VM smoke rows. These are functionality checks, not performance signoff rows.

benchmarks.name: vm_data_sv48_smoke
benchmarks.notes: Runs in M-mode with MPRV/MPP=S so instruction fetch remains physical while LSU accesses use Sv48 translation through DTLB/PTW.

benchmarks.name: vm_ifetch_sv48_smoke
benchmarks.notes: Enters S-mode and fetches from an executable Sv48 virtual page before storing PASS through a translated S-mode tohost mapping.

benchmarks.name: vm_ifetch_fault_sv48_smoke
benchmarks.notes: Enters S-mode at a readable but non-executable Sv48 page and verifies an instruction page fault with mcause=12 and mtval equal to the faulting VA.

benchmarks.name: vm_store_fault_sv48_smoke
benchmarks.notes: Uses MPRV/MPP=S to verify a store to a read-only Sv48 page traps with mcause=15 and mtval equal to the faulting VA.

benchmarks.name: vm_ad_update_sv48_smoke
benchmarks.notes: Verifies hardware-managed Sv48 PTE A update before TLB fill and D update on a later translated store hit.

benchmarks.name: vm_perm_sv48_smoke
benchmarks.notes: Uses MPRV to verify Sv48 DTLB SUM, MXR, and U/S data permission behavior.

benchmarks.name: vm_superpage_sv48_smoke
benchmarks.notes: Uses MPRV to verify Sv48 DTLB translation through positive 1 GiB and 2 MiB superpage leaf mappings.

benchmarks.name: vm_canonical_sv48_smoke
benchmarks.notes: Verifies Sv48 noncanonical data and instruction virtual addresses raise load and instruction page faults.
